query: London most recent reported population 2024 2025 population
answer: London's population in 2024 was 9,748,000, and it is estimated to be 9,841,000 in 2025. The most recent estimate for 2026 is 9,927,020.

results.title: How Many People Live in London? A Look at the 2025 Population
results.snippet: What is London's current population in 2025? According to the World Population Review, the estimated population of London is 9,840,740 people.
